allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, OwningProcess; Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName)

PowerShell(try { Stop-Process -Id 23360 -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction Stop; "killed" } catch { "err: $_" }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($null -eq $c\) { "port 8000 free" } else { "still held by PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)"; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'python|uvicorn' } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName })

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 15100,38936 -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($null -eq $c\) { "port 8000 free" } else { "still held by PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)" })

PowerShell(foreach \($p in 8000,5173\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} } } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700; foreach \($p in 8000,5173\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "port $p still held" } else { "port $p free" } })

PowerShell(foreach \($p in 8000,5173\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} } } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 600; "cleaned")
